_comment: Ground-truth retrieval queries for AAD-specific benchmark. Each query has 1-3 'right answer' segments (slugs without .md). 'primary' = the canonical anchor; 'also' = strongly relevant adjacents. Scoring uses primary for hit/MRR; 'also' counted as supplementary credit.

queries.query: find the segment that defines η* (update gain) — the optimal weight an agent assigns to new observations relative to its prior model
find the derivation that establishes the persistence condition (when an agent can keep up with environmental change)
what is the relationship between satisfaction gap and control regret
find where the framework discusses directed separation between M_t (model) and Σ_t (strategy) — epistemic update being goal-blind while purposeful update depends on the model
logogenic vs logozoetic agent distinction — language-constituted versus language-living agents
Pearl causal hierarchy — association, intervention, counterfactual rungs — as it appears in AAD
strategy as a probabilistic causal DAG with AND/OR nodes and edges weighted by confidence
the orient cascade — how an observation triggers model update, then strategy revision, then possibly objective revision
information bottleneck formulation — Tishby compression of model state to retain only task-relevant information
mismatch signal δ — discrepancy between predicted observations and actual observations
Lyapunov derivation of the sector condition for nonlinear correction dynamics
adaptive tempo T — the rate at which the agent corrects its model in response to mismatch
